title: viola × davisii
intro: Viola × davisii, also known as Davis's violet or Davis' pansy violet, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Violaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Viola × davisii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Viola × davisii is often used in topical creams, salves, and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
